title: verbascum × permixtum
intro: Verbascum × permixtum, also known as the mixed mullein, is a hybrid plant belonging to the verbascum genus, characterized by its large, yellow flowers and velvety leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Verbascum × permixtum include its ability to ease respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve sleep quality. In herbal preparations, Verbascum × permixtum is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
